LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GARUDA LABS, INC., DBA INSTAWORK, ADVANTAGE WORKFORCE SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MATTER IS NOT CONTESTED. NO ARGUMENT IS HELD. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GARUDA LABS, INC. DBA INSTAWORK'S (INSTAWORK) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PROCEEDINGS ARE STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. THE COURT TO REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY MR. WEBER. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew Weber, Esq. of Tel. , appearing for Defendants Garuda Labs, Inc. DBA Instawork, Advantage Workforce Services, LLC.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANTS GARUDA LABS, INC., DBA INSTAWORK, ADVANTAGE WORKFORCE SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

The matter is not contested. Argument is not held. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Garuda Labs, Inc. dba Instawork's (Instawork) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration.

The Court to review the proposed order submitted by Mr. Weber.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy Malone. (302/RCE)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-09-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
